title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Rustomjee Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Rustomjee Group
jsonLd.description:
Rustomjee Group has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rustomjee Group:
Rustomjee Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rustomjee Group!
